## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated the README/docs if behavior or keys changed
